race.comment: DEMARCATE (3) is first-up from a four-month spell and has transferred from the Hayes boys to Jane Clement. Beaten just 2.1 lengths in a BM62 at Cranbourne when fresh from a spell last prep. Best form puts him right in contention. LORD REMLAP (5) started at $1.65 and got the cash on debut last time out over 1000m at this track. Subsequent trial winner who certainly looks good enough to go to this next level. TRUCE (11) found 900m a bit sharp when first-up at Newcastle last start. Placed at this track when second-up last prep. Well in after Small's claim so has a few things in her favour. BONOYSTER (9) is racing well and on a seven-day back-up cannot be underestimated. CHAMBER OF SECRETS (6) was poor first-up but did improve at the second run last prep. Lightly raced with plenty of upside.
